title: Origins SMP Extended
description: Modpack based on Origins SMP, modified and extended for my private SMP. Feel free to try it out for yourself
body: Based on Origins SMP Added a bunch of cosmetic and world gen mods for some extended experience. Includes Macaw's mods not available on Modrinth:\ Bridges, Furniture, Lights, Roofs, Trapdoors, Windows Currently in testing phase. Will make changes to the modpack before making it public.
